title: Chainmailed
description: Give chainmail armor a well deserved rework with this vanilla-styled mod!
body:
![Chainmailed Logo](https://imgur.com/T0hEjp3.png)

![NEW FEATURES](https://i.imgur.com/7F1TxDa.png)
- Chainmailing
  
![GIF](https://i.imgur.com/5JlNEU0.gif)

_While holding chainmail in your offhand it can be placed underneath
other armor pieces as long as they match the same armor slot_

_Chainmailed armor gains a bonus to armor equal to that of
the chainmail placed underneath and a new attribute called
Impact Resistance!_


- Layers

  ![GIF](https://i.imgur.com/kvBrrag.gif)
  
_Upon breaking, chainmailed armor will reveal the layer beneath it!_



- Impact Resistance
  
  ![GIF](https://i.imgur.com/0DWdqDJ.gif)

_Chainmail armor now grants Impact Resistance, a new attribute
that negates all non-magic damage received by a flat amount_

 
_A full set of Chainmail or Chainmailed armor grants enough
impact resistance to reduce all non-magic damage received by
one full heart_
